title: RegLens HK RC3 core 50 pilot selection plan
purpose: Pilot extraction coverage, reviewer workflow, and source handling across MCHK and DCHK decisions.
statistical_note: This is a planned judgment-review pilot, not a statistical sample. Counts and strata are operational targets only.

selection_notes: Prefer decisions with extractable text and complete public metadata.
Cover charge, finding, sanction, factor, and authority patterns where available.
Exclude source PDFs or derived source text from git.
DCHK entries may be metadata-only where judgment text is unavailable or unsuitable for processing.
Track the 14 July 2018 publication coverage change as metadata, not as republication permission.
Exclude source PDFs or derived source text from git.

inclusion_criteria: Hong Kong professional disciplinary decision or published disciplinary metadata.
Source provenance can be recorded internally.
Processing is permitted by the active source automation and LLM policies.
exclusion_criteria: Private patient/contact identifiers cannot be safely contained for the intended workflow.
Source licence or policy prohibits the planned processing mode.
Document exceeds configured page, byte, OCR, or review limits.
